summary: Excellent front‑of‑house (FOB) audience recording captures a heavy, tight 1992 show with an electrifying Dark Star and soaring crowd energy.
review: The four reviewers all rave about the performance – describing it as well‑played, tight, and featuring a standout Dark Star that makes this one of the heavier shows of the era.  The FOB source is praised as “great sounding” and “finally a great sounding source,” indicating clear, lively audio despite being an audience tap.  Overall the setlist flow and atmosphere receive high marks.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are 4‑5 stars, highlighting both a strong musical performance and a good‑quality FOB recording; the weighted average yields a rating in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call it a "great sounding source" with no complaints about muffiness or dropouts, indicating clear FOB capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Tight, well‑played set with a great setlist; crowd energy noted as amazing and the show described as heavy and exciting.
